description_long: This is a large, rectangular military-style toolbox with a rugged olive green exterior. The box features reinforced edges and a weathered, matte finish, suggesting it is designed for durability in harsh environments. On one long side, there are three visible black latches for securing the lid, while the opposite side has two robust, recessed handles for carrying. The short ends each have a single recessed handle, all made of black metal or heavy-duty plastic. The surface is flat with subtle molded ridges for structural strength, and there are no visible logos or external labels. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and protection for tools or equipment stored inside.
description: A large, olive green, military-style toolbox with black latches and recessed handles, featuring a rugged, weathered finish and reinforced edges.
description_view_0: The front view shows a plain olive green surface with three black latches evenly spaced along the top edge.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a single recessed black handle centered on the short end, with minimal surface detail.
description_view_2: The back view displays two large recessed black handles and three latches, indicating this is the main access side for carrying and opening.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with a single recessed black handle and a plain surface.
attribute_handle_type: Recessed rectangular handles made of black metal or heavy-duty plastic, fixed in place, designed for ergonomic grip and flush with the surface for protection.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Three black metal or plastic clasp latches on the front, likely spring-loaded for secure closure, with no visible keyholes or combination locks.
attribute_compartment_configuration: The exterior suggests a single large internal compartment with no visible trays, drawers, or dividers; compartment configuration is implied to be a single, undivided space.
